name: golang-skills
description: 20 modular skills for idiomatic Go — each under 225 lines, backed by 48 reference files, 8 automation scripts (all with --json, --limit, --force), and 4 asset templates. Covers error handling, naming, testing, concurrency, interfaces, generics, documentation, logging, performance, and more. Activates automatically with progressive disclosure and conditional cross-references.
